claims.notes: Open-source Python CLI tool generating tailored AI Agent Bill of Rights documents in Markdown and PDF, grounded in IEEE EAD, EU AI Act, and Asilomar frameworks. Includes 10-rights catalogue, profile-driven selection, 3 example profiles, and 3 sample outputs.
